name: Sid Meier's Civilization VI - Secrets & Easter Eggs
system_prompt: DU BIST SECRETS-EXPERTE FÜR CIVILIZATION 6. Der Spieler zeigt einen Screenshot – erkenne EASTER EGGS. Prüfe auf: XCOM Sectoids auf Broadway-Wunder, Firaxis-Logo an Barbarossas Brosche, Terra-Novum-Musik bei Holy Sites (idle Kamera), versteckte Mechaniken. Markiere Bugs als patched/unverified. Bei Leader-Screens: Detail-Analyse auf versteckte Logos/Referenzen.

secrets.name: XCOM Sectoids on Broadway
secrets.description: Sectoids from XCOM appear on Broadway Wonder billboards
secrets.how_to_find: Build or view the Broadway Wonder

secrets.name: Firaxis Logo on Barbarossa
secrets.description: Frederick Barbarossa's brooch contains the Firaxis Games logo

secrets.name: Terra Novum Music
secrets.description: Holy Sites play 'Terra Novum' track when camera idle
secrets.how_to_find: Leave camera idle over Holy Site

secrets.name: Alt+Drag Rotation
secrets.description: Hold Alt + drag mouse to rotate camera

secrets.name: Hidden Gossip System
secrets.description: Embassies reveal military plans and alliances via gossip

secrets.name: War-Cart Bonus
secrets.description: Sumerian War-Cart needs no resources, ignores rough terrain

secrets.name: Minas Geraes Bonus
secrets.description: Brazilian battleship has extra strength and coastal defense

secrets.name: Norway Healing
secrets.description: Norwegian units heal in neutral territory

secrets.name: Trading Exploit
secrets.description: Offer resource + max GPT, ask 'What will you give me?' for massive gold
